title: calathiana angulosa
intro: Calathiana angulosa, a plant species found in the Himalayan region, is defined as a perennial herb belonging to the family Apiaceae. It possesses medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits. The health benefits of Calathiana angulosa include its potential to treat various ailments, such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and relieve pain. Herbal preparations of Calathiana angulosa include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by drying the plant's leaves and stems and then steeping them in hot water or mixing them with a solvent like ethanol.
